patch.value: First-party service collision: builtin-calendar and builtin-guide-shell both override the global output_format service

2026-07-04 sandbox audit: with all bundled packages installed, pm extension --doctor warns extension_output_service_override_global:output_format for BOTH builtin-calendar and builtin-guide-shell — two shipped first-party packages contending for the same global output service. Decide the owner (or scope one override) so a full first-party install is warning-free.
